2018}} |updated = 30 October 2022 }} '''Benjamin Jullien''' (born 1 March 1995) is a French [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sr}} for the [[Baroudeurs de Pia XIII]] in the [[Elite One Championship]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. He previously played for [[SO Avignon]] in the [[Elite One Championship]], [[North Wales Crusaders]] in [[League 1 (rugby league)|League 1]] and the [[Warrington Wolves]] in the [[Super League]]. He has also spent time on loan from [[Warrington Wolves|Warrington]] at the [[Rochdale Hornets]] in [[RFL League 1|Kingstone Press League 1]] and the [[RFL Championship|Championship]]. ==Background== Julien was born in [[Avignon]], [[Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France]]. ==Club career== ===Early career=== Jullien began his career in the juniors at [[Sporting Olympique Avignon]]. He spent some time as a young player in Australia with [[Brisbane Broncos]]. In 2015, Jullien joined the [[North Wales Crusaders]], playing 14 matches in [[League 1 (rugby league)|League 1]] and scoring 7 tries.{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2016/may/14/benjamin-jullien-finds-feet-surprise-package-warrington |title=Benjamin Jullien finds his feet as surprise package for Warrington|publisher=theguardian.com|date=14 May 2016|accessdate=1 January 2017}} ===Warrington Wolves=== Jullien joined [[Warrington Wolves]] ahead of the 2016 Super League season, making his Super League debut from the bench in the round one victory over the [[Leeds Rhinos]]. He scored his first Super League try in a victory over the [[Wigan Warriors]] on April 28.{{cite web|url=http://www.warringtonguardian.co.uk/news/14488018.Jullien_loving_Wire_life/?ref=arc|title=Warrington Wolves' young French international Benjamin Jullien enjoying life at the club|publisher=warringtonguardian.co.uk|date=31 December 2017|accessdate=1 January 2018}} ===Catalans Dragons=== He played in the [[2018 Challenge Cup Final]] victory over the [[Warrington Wolves]] at [[Wembley Stadium]].{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2018/aug/25/catalans-dragons-warrington-wolves-challenge-cup-final-match-report|title=Catalans Dragons beat Warrington in Challenge Cup final to make history|publisher=Guardian|date=25 August 2018|accessdate=5 November 2019}} ==International career== Jullien was a member of the France squad for the [[2014 European Cup]], but did not feature. He made his France début the following year in a victory over [[Serbia national rugby league team|Serbia]]. He also participated for France in the [[2015 European Cup]] where he played all 3 matches as well as in a [http://www.sportinglife.com/rugby-league/live/match-report/43791/england-v-france test match] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151026223631/http://www.sportinglife.com/rugby-league/live/match-report/43791/england-v-france |date=2015-10-26 }} against [[England national rugby league team|England]]. The following year he made another appearance for France in their [[2016 Rugby League Four Nations#France vs England|end of year test match]] against England in Avignon. In the [[2017 Rugby League World Cup|2017 World Cup]] he played in all three games for France.{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/42053418|title=Benjamin Jullien: Catalans Dragons sign Warrington Wolves back-rower|publisher=bbc.co.uk|date=20 November 2017|accessdate=1 January 2018}} In the opening game of the [[2021 Rugby League World Cup]] group stage, Jullien scored two tries for France in a 34-12 victory over Greece.{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/63293849|title=Rugby League World Cup: France 34-12 Greece - Les Bleus beat debutants|website=www.bbc.co.uk}} ==References== {{Reflist|30em}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-489-jullien-benjamin/ Catalans Dragons profile] *[http://www.ffr13.fr/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/benjamin_jullien-791x1024.jpg Profile at ffr13.fr] *[https://web.archive.org/web/20171023174357/http://www.rlwc2017.com/players?team=380#Benjamin-Jullien Statistics at rlwc2017.com] *[https://www.superleague.co.uk/player/130/benjamin%3Cbr-%3Ejullien SL profile] *[https://www.ffr13.fr/joueur/benjamin-jullien/ France profile] *[https://www.nrl.com/players/rugby-league-world-cup/france/benjamin-jullien/ French profile] {{Catalans Dragons - 2018 Challenge Cup Final winners}} {{France 2017 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{France 2021 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Jullien, Benjamin}} [[Category:1995 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:Sportspeople from Avignon]] [[Category:Baroudeurs de Pia XIII players]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:North Wales Crusaders players]] [[Category:Rochdale Hornets players]] [[Category:Rugby league second-rows]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Avignon]] [[Category:Sporting Olympique Avignon players]] [[Category:Warrington Wolves players]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]]
